Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Chronicler]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Chronicler is a Reader of impressive skill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Chronicler knows of a treasure owned by the Emperor that was never entrusted to another.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Chronicler is a character on the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Chronicler staggered to his feet clutching the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Chronicler wailed after losing the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Chronicler is present at the table.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Chronicler is a person who may have control over Bliss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Chronicler might deserve the throne if it is a sentence of insanity and death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — A Chronicler is someone capable of writing notes quickly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Naberius Clayborn is known as The Chronicler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Naberius is a former Chronicler.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Chroniclers are talented Readers by definition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — A spade embedded in the Chronicler's calf drops him to his knees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Naberius is a Chronicler.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Chroniclers carry a belt of wax candles at their waist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Chroniclers are present in the room.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Chroniclers carry alchemically treated candles to store Intent for memory recollection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Chronicler is a role performed by the Heads of the Witness’ Guild.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
